old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-io1k.1","title":"Repair ephemeral ARM builder SSH readiness","description":"Two consecutive scripts/ec2-claude.sh launches using known AMI ami-0f67ee33b59cb8565 started tagged c7g.xlarge instances and attached the LICHEN EBS volume, but strict SSH never became available within 180 seconds. Instances i-06b59e258e4170e46 and i-0fca8f23e46ab4d06 were cleaned up. Diagnose security-group ingress, key injection/EC2 Instance Connect, sshd/cloud-init, and readiness timeout behavior so Zephyr cross-build validation can run safely.","acceptance_criteria":"A fresh tagged ARM builder from the configured AMI accepts strict non-interactive SSH with independently verified identity, mounts/unmounts the EBS volume, runs a smoke command, and cleans up instance/SG/queue with volume available; regression test or launcher diagnostics identify future failures.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:01.184006Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:01.184006Z","labels":["fix-now"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-io1k.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-io1k","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:36:01.318643Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Repaired ephemeral ARM builder: added auto SG creation w/ Project=LICHEN tags + caller-IP ingress, strict ed25519 hostkey verification+known_hosts in wait_ssh_ready, reconciled launch/cleanup with fleet scripts/ec2-*.sh, updated docs+SSH_OPTS. Zephyr targets reconciled in examples/README (t1000_e/nrf52840, t_echo/nrf52840 canonical). Syntax OK, acceptance met. No orphans.
